flows_xml:
<available_flows>
  <category name="analysis">
    <flow name="data-analysis-pipeline"
      description="Parallel data analysis across multiple datasets — fan-out researcher agents then synthesizer + writer"
    />
  </category>
  <category name="research">
    <flow name="parallel-research-6-frameworks"
      description="Parallel N-framework technology research: fan-out researcher agents → synthesizer merges into structured comparison report with matrix, deep-dive, selection guide, and trends."
    />
    <flow name="test-promote-flow"
      description="Parallel research with reviewer — fan-out two researcher agents then reviewer synthesizes"
    />
  </category>
  <category name="utility">
    <flow name="simple-summarizer"
      description="Single-agent summarization flow — thin wrapper around a summarizer agent"
    />
  </category>
</available_flows>
